## 📅 IT/LLM 데일리 브리핑 - 2026-03-29

### 🤖 Claude / Anthropic
- [Claude AI Powers NASA's First AI-Planned Mars Rover Drive](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMic0FVX3lxTE44cDdZMG1COGd6Yy1RUlZDZFFNM2xmb0Vyd2JUdW45bzc5LXBpTlZNeW15eW0yX05GMjhpT3lORVd1NHB4ZjU2ekdjY0N0YnRFRzk0UGx4V0lVanZFQWtmOG9uSmthVU9td1NwdGRBenpBT3c?oc=5) — Claude AI가 NASA의 첫 번째 AI 계획 화성 로버 드라이브를 지원했습니다.

- [Anthropic's Claude Draws in Record Number of Consumers](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMirAFBVV95cUxQel9adENrQmNQOGoya1dOSzZTamxKV0tSMjR5aDg4Z242WTRSZjZqMTR4dWJqSlp1U1pBWkFoRFJjVllYQzg2bkZzVThQNnp5ODRLZVpid1BucXMzbEpUUEhsMmpWYjJGajNBeGFRbEV0ZmNCc09raW1NZFE2X19SMjVld0ZURHlicGFkeHhfOThJT3ZBWWdDRFZzVXBOOVJYOVR5NWQtc0VaX3BJ?oc=5) — Anthropic의 Claude가 기록적인 수의 소비자를 유치하며 급성장하고 있습니다.

- [Cheap Chinese models are overtaking Anthropic](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMid0FVX3lxTE5XdlJHcmFZM1NqdHJGN0pzeV9SbG5abkZLQVpWZXk2aThoaFVNR2VYUkxTZ3JyYkFkYklzQnNPc01UQjE1bmk4a3BhNVE2ZlpPbzhmaUF6QVpUWWtyeUtpU1p6UVE1RWVMR1phSDd1SjNveGFfUzlZ?oc=5) — 저렴한 중국산 AI 모델들이 Anthropic의 시장 점유율을 위협하고 있습니다.

- [Anthropic vs. The Pentagon: CEO Rejects Hegseth's Demand to Remove AI Safeguards](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMingFBVV95cUxQczhwV1hkNEt1bVZuVVpzNUxyOS1lTEdEbFFHZ0lFQW4yc1hvUGdhbjFzVXloc3pXNnY3d09rLVN0MGdNV1BkY1VXS21JTWFiVEV5dFBaV2xXcms1cUJKRnV0c2lZc2VqZHhBcnM0d1Mtc214OV9LczFOQXlFMWlpTm5SVlpXREVaVVAtNURsRlk2LUlwazh2ZFpCZVVFdw?oc=5) — Anthropic CEO가 국방부의 AI 안전장치 제거 요구를 거부했습니다.

### 🧠 LLM / AI 일반
- [Speaking of Voxtral - Mistral AI](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiS0FVX3lxTFB2b19XVXdUSkQ4d2RvNksyaFlfWUdENjRfanF2YkpUZGVxeUtHaEpqeHlRRlhtVVF6TWpqM0cyUDREa2Nka1lwVVMzZw?oc=5) — Mistral AI가 새로운 음성 AI 모델 'Voxtral'을 공개했습니다.

- [Gemini AI chatbot to help stumped Dragon Quest X players](https://news.google.?oc=5) — 스퀘어 에닉스가 드래곤 퀘스트 X에 Gemini AI 챗봇 'Chatty Slimey'를 도입합니다.

- [Bluesky leans into AI with Attie, an app for building custom feeds](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiogFBVV95cUxOLXA3NENvNWdRVVFhVzhBalBqc3dfcExwODVZNWlNOEJuZXJNZGdmWFdDeXhETHl2YlcxT19WV2FhbEFMWlJLeFJ2c2hieDFEcnZCTHVQcE1OblVfRWJEZUhBQ2FXVFU0ajB3N0tWOThZM0xmMDJpcWtPOTFQcmFkd21PeV9aRGoxdWVQcXJfcHo0R1RoMDBuY04tTkY0QjZLSHc?oc=5) — Bluesky가 맞춤형 피드 제작을 위한 AI 앱 'Attie'를 출시했습니다.

### 💻 IT / 테크
- [Small Business Technology News: Claude Can Now Control Your Computer](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMixAFBVV95cUxPNEhXc2tQTGlpWVZ6TnFyXzRKNGFPMWlFYTNUeWdmY3hpV3dOUG9ZMm1RR3pWbHZlY1NNLUV0TGtOeGtsS2xXSFd1NWNPUTVuVW1sYVlvN1pOTVNyb3RYRGZtMm9YdDlrRm5ES1hDNHpvdlVSbWpsUkY5WTlBb2RjRmZMSU9Wa1BTa1JVaTVaUmNzTUNiSVhXYmFxZWxHVms4VVpZT1NEcXROM2FzSE1CODk0SDhHakFzVUVyV0Q1T1djTndn?oc=5) — Claude AI가 컴퓨터를 직접 제어할 수 있는 새로운 기능을 출시했습니다.

- [Apple to turn 50 on April 1: Read CEO Tim Cook's message](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi-?oc=5) — 애플이 4월 1일로 창립 50주년을 맞으며 팀 쿡 CEO의 기념 메시지가 공개되었습니다.

- [Consumer Tech News: Netflix & Sony Hikes Prices, OpenAI Flags Microsoft Dependency Risk](https://news.google.?oc=5) — Netflix와 Sony의 가격 인상, OpenAI의 Microsoft 의존성 위험 등 주요 테크 뉴스가 발표되었습니다.

### 📈 주식 / 금융
- [Prediction: This Will Be Nvidia's Stock Price 3 Years From Now](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMimAFBVV95cUxPYUgtMng3MHdmT3doLXRRSENoZDY4M1NzcDVLZ29aOEFjWVdEQ0tIZWw0VFJHbVRJbHYzYnA5a0YteVFBQlBuV0FsTExDVlhCVUJBUW9Gb0hRMFJ2T2RBZktsWWFFOVpfWXpiSlZxbXlaMGN2RHdMNFdialV5d1ZONnlrYmQwcHcwRVRyZTlodTJ0RlA1UWpfeg?oc=5) — 전문가들이 3년 후 엔비디아 주가를 예측하며 장기 전망을 제시했습니다.

- [Nvidia Stock Growth & $1 Trillion Chip Sales Forecast for 2027](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMipgFBVV95cUxPT2xfWmFvNzEzcDFYZzg4MDNvNHg2VzF3TDkxM2x6eE1malhpTXVKa0JNUjZ5cFJfMFJVcGhYWXFnejdwMV9lWUFwcG8zU0U1TVBPRFRBbVc1VXpBem1IVmdHZlkxZjdaVE5uajV4aGVobnlxRlItVjlBOHJ2S2JEY1JreFdEVlpZT2p1WUFTUWk4b3VqaWxfdWZ0Umdtc0lYM09IWjBB?oc=5) — 엔비디아가 2027년까지 1조 달러 규모의 칩 매출을 달성할 것으로 전망됩니다.

- [NVIDIA (NVDA) backed start-up Reflection AI to raise $2.5 billion](https://news.google.?oc=5) — 엔비디아가 지원하는 스타트업 Reflection AI가 25억 달러 투자 유치를 추진 중입니다.
